content.en:
"This time there are a lot of real monarchs attracted!"

Ye Tian muttered in his heart.

Not to mention the tens of thousands of True Monarchs who are still watching around, there are as many as hundreds of True Monarchs who are still fighting at the entrance of the medicine garden.

However, strictly speaking, it is nearly a hundred true monarchs who are besieging the two true monarchs.

Because these two True Monarchs are in a state of joining forces, they want to monopolize this medicine garden, and the other True Monarchs naturally disagree, so they join forces to try to invade the medicine garden.

That's why the battle is all about!

As for the other True Monarchs around, because they were too weak, they were seriously injured by the slightest aftermath, so they didn't dare to participate in the entry again, but they were reluctant to take the big opportunity of the dojo.

"Wanfa Daozi is here!"

Ye Tian's arrival attracted the attention of many true monarchs.

Even the hundreds of True Monarchs in the battle seemed to have begun to withdraw from the battle one by one.

After all, Ye Tiannai is the number one true monarch on the True Monarch List, and his strength is far stronger than other True Monarchs, if Ye Tian is involved, they are not opponents at all.

It can even be said that if these true monarchs join forces, it is estimated that they will not be able to stop Ye Tian.

In an instant, the battle was over, and the eyes of a famous true monarch were staring at Ye Tian, as if waiting for Ye Tian's decision.

If Ye Tian planned to occupy the medicine garden and the dojo alone, they would not follow Ye Tian's wishes, and they would inevitably join forces to fight against Ye Tian.

Even if they can't beat them, they can summon the nearby True Monarchs, as long as there are enough True Monarchs, no matter how strong Ye Tian is, he can't compete with them.

I have to say that Ye Tian did have the idea of occupying this medicine garden or even a dojo, but looking at so many True Monarchs, if he really did this, I am afraid that he would offend too many True Monarchs and forces.

"I suggest that they all enter the medicine garden, how many magic medicines can be obtained, it all depends on their own ability, how about it?"

Ye Tian proposed.

At this time, many True Monarchs were shocked.

After all, with their thoughts, Ye Tian should have the medicine garden to himself!

If they had the strength of Ye Tian, where would they be willing to share these magic medicines with others, they would definitely take them into their hands at all costs!

They thought so in their hearts, but they didn't dare say it.

"Wanfa Daozi is right, I agree with Wanfa Daozi's suggestion!"

A true monarch shouted.

The other true monarchs also agreed one by one, if they didn't agree, they probably wouldn't even get a single magic medicine, and now that they have the opportunity to enter the medicine garden to get the magic medicine, they are not stupid, how can they oppose it.

Only the two True Monarchs were a little dissatisfied, even angry.

If Ye Tian doesn't come, sooner or later the two of them will be able to kill the other True Monarchs one by one, and then monopolize this medicine garden, although they can't dominate the dojo, after all, other powerful True Monarchs will come one by one, but if they can monopolize the medicine garden and take away the magic medicine here, this kind of big harvest is enough.

But now, Ye Tian wants to share these magic medicines, so how many magic medicines can the two of them get!

This is not the perfect plan in their hearts!

But Ye Tian spoke, and they didn't dare to object, otherwise if Ye Tian made a move on them, they estimated that they would die on the spot.

"We agree!"

The two True Monarchs nodded in response.

"Then let's all go in!"

Ye Tian said.

Wow!!!

A famous true monarch poured into the medicine garden, and no one fought.

After Ye Tian entered the medicine garden, he saw some true monarch corpses, these true monarchs were not the true monarchs of the dojo itself, but the true monarchs who came in from the outside world.

Before, the medicine garden was discovered, and some true monarchs also came in, and then started a fight.

With the arrival of the two True Monarchs, after killing all the True Monarchs in the Medicine Garden, they blocked the other True Monarchs at the entrance, but the True Monarchs came too much, and they fell into a bitter battle for a while, which was the later situation.

"Forbidden!"

Ye Tian saw the countless prohibitions in the medicine garden, basically every divine medicine was covered by the prohibition, and one divine medicine occupied a small piece of land in the medicine garden, and it did not affect each other.

These prohibitions are mainly to isolate the mixing of the breaths of the divine medicines, otherwise, one divine medicine is easily affected by other divine medicines, resulting in the year being affected, and it is difficult to grow to an extremely high vintage.

Or some terrifying elixirs that devour the aura will devour other elixirs.

In order to prevent accidents, the people in the dojo divided the magic medicine, and this prohibition was arranged.

Of course, the defensive capabilities of these prohibitions are not very strong, otherwise, everyone would not want to get the magic medicine.

At this time, when the True Monarchs entered here, they began to break the prohibitions one after another.

Once the prohibition is broken, then the internal elixir can be taken away.

Ye Tian didn't waste any time, and began to destroy the prohibition of a magic medicine in front of him.

Click!

With a casual blow, Ye Tian shattered a forbidden strain and carefully took out this magic medicine.

According to the year, this magic medicine is at least 1.1 billion years old, and its value is very high, far more precious than a top-level innate origin thing!

Ye Tian took a look at the other True Monarchs, some True Monarchs were difficult to shake the ban, and it would take a lot of time to break the ban outside of a magic medicine.

According to their speed, it is estimated that they will only be able to obtain one magic medicine this time.

Ye Tian didn't waste time, he went all out, smashed the prohibition outside the magic medicine one by one, and obtained the magic medicine one by one.

The others were very jealous when they saw Ye Tian harvesting the magic medicine so quickly, but no one dared to snatch the magic medicine from Ye Tian, otherwise it would be looking for death!

Ten plants!

100 plants!

A thousand!

10,000 plants!

This medicine garden has at least 100,000 divine medicines, and Ye Tian's speed is too fast, he has harvested tens of thousands of divine medicines in a short period of time, and he is still harvesting.

The other two True Monarchs have gained a lot, and they have also harvested thousands of divine medicines, although they are not as good as Ye Tian, but they are also unimaginable wealth.

Just when Ye Tian was expecting to harvest more than 50,000 divine medicines, the breath of the True Monarch came from the outside world.

Among them, there are also three powerful half-step True Ancestor Breaths!

When the three half-step true ancestors came, Ye Tian knew which three half-step true ancestors they were.

Falling Sea True Monarch!

Jin Luan Zhenjun!

Storm Bear True King!

These three half-step true ancestors descended on the medicine garden, and they did not do it immediately, but seized the time to break the ban on one divine medicine after another, and joined the ranks of collecting divine medicines.

The speed at which these three half-step True Monarchs harvested the divine medicine was not slow, and the speed at which the Luohai True Monarch harvested the divine medicine was still above Ye Tian.

Of course, this does not mean that Luohai Zhenjun's strength is stronger than Ye Tian's, it can only be said that Luohai Zhenjun's means of breaking the ban are more clever.

I saw Luohai Zhenjun holding a small wooden stick, constantly beating the prohibition, and whenever he was hit by the wooden stick, these prohibitions were like glass broken by an iron rod, and they shattered!

Seeing this scene, Ye Tian knew that he could only obtain 30,000 magic pills at most.

The only thing to be thankful for was that he had taken away the elixirs that were billions of years old at the beginning, plus he had collected the elixirs earlier than the three half-step true ancestors at the beginning, so the harvest must have been the most.
